description_long: This nightstand features a two-tone design with a natural wood top and hutch, and a painted lower section. The upper portion includes a raised back and side panels, forming a shallow open shelf ideal for storing small items or books. The main tabletop is spacious and flat, suitable for placing lamps, clocks, or decorative objects. Below the tabletop, there is a single drawer with a small round knob, providing enclosed storage. The legs are elegantly curved, giving the piece a classic, vintage-inspired look. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a blend of functional and decorative elements suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A two-tone nightstand with a wood top, open shelf, single drawer, and curved legs, blending classic and functional design. Features a raised hutch and a small round drawer knob.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf, spacious tabletop, single drawer with a round knob, and curved legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the hutch and the profile of the curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back of the hutch and the painted lower section, with no visible drawer or knob.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the hutch's profile and the elegant leg curvature.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall, beside a bed or seating area
